Good Typography

This page uses distinctive fonts, proper pairing, and strong hierarchy.

Two Font Families

Newsreader (serif) for headings, Karla for body. Clear contrast in both structure and personality, and neither face has been adopted into the current AI-default monoculture.

Strong Size Hierarchy

Sizes range from 12px to 48px — a 4:1 ratio with clear visual steps.

Caption text is clearly distinct from body.
